flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Rock Valley College rose 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.3k → $8.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rock Valley College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rock Valley College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.6k → $7.4k).
